column4: 3100|Catacombs — Entrance|midnight_rain|Stone stairs descend from the cemetery crypt. The air is cold and still. Bones line the walls.|dark|||||

column3: 3101|Catacombs — West Passage|midnight_rain|A narrow tunnel. Skulls are stacked in neat rows. Candle niches are empty.|dark|||||
column4: 3102|Catacombs — Central Hall|midnight_rain|A wider chamber. Pillars of stacked bones support the ceiling. It's architecturally impressive.|dark|||||
column5: 3103|Catacombs — East Passage|midnight_rain|The tunnel curves. Newer bones here — less than a century old. The tradition continues.|dark|||||

column2: 3104|Catacombs — Dead End|midnight_rain|The tunnel ends. But the wall here sounds hollow when you knock.|dark|||||
column3: 3105|Catacombs — Shrine|midnight_rain|A small altar with fresh flowers. Someone still visits. A name is carved: 'REMEMBER.'|dark,indoors|||||
column4: 3106|Catacombs — Crossroads|midnight_rain|Four tunnels meet. Each is marked with a different symbol. One smells of incense.|dark|||||
column5: 3107|Catacombs — Flooded Section|midnight_rain|Water fills the tunnel to ankle depth. It's cold and dark. Something ripples ahead.|dark|||||
column6: 3108|Catacombs — Collapsed|midnight_rain|A cave-in blocks most of the passage. A gap at the top is barely passable.|dark|||||

column2: 3109|Secret Room — Mob Archive|midnight_rain|Behind the hollow wall: filing cabinets of criminal records. Every crime family documented.|dark|||||
column3: 3110|Catacombs — Ritual Chamber|midnight_rain|A circular room with symbols on the floor. Candles burn in a circle. Fresh blood on the altar.|dark|||||
column4: 3111|Catacombs — Ossuary|midnight_rain|An artistic arrangement of bones. Chandeliers of femurs. Walls of skulls. Macabre beauty.|dark|||||
column5: 3112|Catacombs — Underground River|midnight_rain|A river flows through a natural cave. A boat is tied to a post. It could carry two.|dark|||||
column6: 3113|Catacombs — Exit to Docks|midnight_rain|A tunnel that emerges at the waterfront. Used by smugglers for generations.|dark|||||

column3: 3114|Catacombs — Deep Tombs|midnight_rain|Older tombs. The inscriptions are in Latin. These are the city's founders.|dark|||||
column4: 3115|Catacombs — The Vault|midnight_rain|A sealed chamber. The lock is modern — someone added it recently. What's worth protecting down here?|dark|||||
column5: 3116|Catacombs — Forgotten Chapel|midnight_rain|A tiny underground chapel. Pews for twelve. The crucifix is inverted. Not a good sign.|dark,indoors|||||

column3: 3117|Catacombs — Ancient Passage|midnight_rain|Pre-city tunnels. The stonework is Roman. This city is older than anyone knows.|dark|||||
column4: 3118|Catacombs — Roman Bath|midnight_rain|An ancient bathhouse, still partially intact. The water is warm from geothermal heat.|dark|||||
column5: 3119|Catacombs — Deepest Point|midnight_rain|The lowest accessible point. A door of ancient bronze. No keyhole. No handle. Just a face.|dark|||||
